name: Bleu Cheese Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter an 8-inch springform pan and sprinkle the cracker crumbs on the bottom and sides.
3. In a large bowl, blend together the cream cheese, blue cheese, eggs, flour, salt, picante sauce, and sour cream until smooth.
4. Fold in the chopped green onions.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and sprinkle with walnuts.
6. Bake for 1 hour or until set.
7. Cool completely and chill overnight.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley, tomato roses, or additional chopped green onions if desired.
9. Serve at room temperature on crackers.
